name: loom-playbooks
description: Explicit-only Loom workflow playbook lenses for Codex; invoke them deliberately after loom-core routing.

interface.shortDescription: Explicit-only Loom workflow playbook lenses for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Loom Playbooks provides user-invoked workflow lenses that should be selected deliberately after loom-core routing supplies using-loom doctrine and canonical record skills.
defaultPrompt: Use loom-core for using-loom doctrine and canonical record skills.
Invoke Loom Playbooks explicitly when you want an optional workflow lens; do not treat them as automatic natural-language routes.
